title: Longitudinal Task Progression
objective: Evaluate whether the system preserves and advances multi-step work over multiple checkpoints.
setup: Define one task with at least three milestones.
sequence: Interrupt the task with unrelated work.
Resume later and request the next milestone.
Finalize the task in a later session.
scoring_notes: Use a task where a reset is observable.
Preserve milestone checkpoints in evaluator notes.
